proof:
assume there are no real number ai >= average(ai)
then all ai < average(ai)
WOLOG
assume a1<=a2<=...<=an
(a1+a2+...+an)/n<=n•an/n<=an
contradict with the fact that all ai < average(ai)
Therefore, at least one ai >= average(ai)
